name: RGB Rush 2
short_description: Can you adjust these raw images for a client? Advance your dream of becoming a colour grading professional. Beat the clock, impress your crush again! Practice today! The long awaited sequel.
detailed_description:
You may also like




About the Game

A customer has just bought a very expensive camera for their stock photo business, but they complain all the photos are colourless and seek your help. Can you apply your colour grading skills and save their career?

Multiple game modes:

- RGB mode
- Contrast / brightness mode
- Hue / saturation mode
- Temperature / tint mode
- Opacity mode (bonus)

Timed mode

Finding it too easy to get full marks? Try enabling the timer to add some time pressure.

Use your own images

RGB Rush comes fully equipped with 1500 images to practice on. But if you're tired of them, it's very easy to use your own images for a more personal touch. Just swap out the image folder in the game files (all files must be png, and scaled down to exactly 512x340).

Review and improve

Your accuracy percentage will be immediately shown after you submit your answer, and at the end of the quiz you can review your answers in detail.

Transferrable skills

When you take a photo using a modern phone, it automatically enhances the colours to look realistic and beautiful. But in the photography / video editing industry, you will be working with "raw" data, which at first glance appears to be dull and colourless. However, this seemingly colourless format allows you much more freedom to customise the image and specifically enhance the colours that you need for your project. But it requires skill to understand how to adjust these colours correctly.

Learn today

RGB Rush 2 puts you in the hot seat, by testing your eye with simplified controls and a marking criteria. Can you recreate the given image, only using only the given colour sliders? The skills you learn in this game can be applied to both images and video - the same principles apply.
